MULTI_SPRINT_GUIDE_BEGIN
DESIGN=ONE_PLAN_ONE_ISSUE
MODE=DRY_RUN_LOCAL
PLAN_FILE=crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md
PLAN_TITLE=Plan: split-prs fixture plan
FROM_SPRINT=1
TO_SPRINT=2
DRY_RUN_PLAN_ISSUE=DRY_RUN_PLAN_ISSUE
DRY_RUN_ISSUE_BODY=$AGENT_HOME/out/plan-issue-delivery-loop/duck-plan-plan-issue-body.md
STEP_1=$AGENT_HOME/skills/automation/plan-issue-delivery-loop/scripts/plan-issue-delivery-loop.sh start-plan --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --pr-grouping \<per-sprint\|group\> --dry-run
STEP_2=$AGENT_HOME/skills/automation/plan-issue-delivery-loop/scripts/plan-issue-delivery-loop.sh start-sprint --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --issue DRY_RUN_PLAN_ISSUE --sprint 1 --pr-grouping \<per-sprint\|group\> --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_3=$AGENT_HOME/skills/automation/plan-issue-delivery-loop/scripts/plan-issue-delivery-loop.sh accept-sprint --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --issue DRY_RUN_PLAN_ISSUE --sprint 1 --approved-comment-url \<approval-comment-url-sprint-1\> --pr-grouping \<per-sprint\|group\> --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_4=$AGENT_HOME/skills/automation/plan-issue-delivery-loop/scripts/plan-issue-delivery-loop.sh start-sprint --plan crates/plan-tooling/tests/fixtures/split_prs/duck-plan.md --issue DRY_RUN_PLAN_ISSUE --sprint 2 --pr-grouping \<per-sprint\|group\> --no-comment --dry-run
STEP_5=$AGENT_HOME/skills/automation/plan-issue-delivery-loop/scripts/plan-issue-delivery-loop.sh ready-plan --body-file $AGENT_HOME/out/plan-issue-delivery-loop/duck-plan-plan-issue-body.md --summary Final\ plan\ review --no-comment --no-label-update --dry-run
STEP_6=$AGENT_HOME/skills/automation/plan-issue-delivery-loop/scripts/plan-issue-delivery-loop.sh close-plan --body-file $AGENT_HOME/out/plan-issue-delivery-loop/duck-plan-plan-issue-body.md --approved-comment-url \<final-plan-approval-comment-url\> --dry-run
NOTE_DRY_RUN=Dry-run guide is local-only and does not call GitHub.
NOTE_GROUP_MODE=When using --pr-grouping group, pass --pr-group for every task in the selected scope.
NOTE_SPRINT_GATE=Before starting sprint N+1, sprint N must be reviewed, merged, and accepted.
NOTE_ACCEPT_SYNC=accept-sprint enforces merged PRs for the sprint and syncs sprint task Status to done.
MULTI_SPRINT_GUIDE_END
